name: person_alert
comment: Person-gated record + notify. Cascade: camera -> motion-gated YOLO (decode_detect, class_filter=[0]=person only) -> a person detection event triggers BOTH store_event (pre/post-roll clip) and output_mqtt (publishes to zm-next/detection). Needs an MQTT broker (e.g. `mosquitto -p 1883`). Fill in the camera URL + model_path; on Apple, decode_detect auto-selects the Metal/ANE backend. Subscribe with: mosquitto_sub -t 'zm-next/#' -v
